Senior Farmers Market Nutrition Program
July 8 @ 9:00 am
-
10:30 am
«
Damaged License Plate Replacement Event
Mobile Office – Northampton Recreation Center
»
My office is partnering with the Northampton County Area Agency on Aging to help you apply for the Senior Farmers Market Nutrition Program at various times throughout the month of July. Eligible seniors may receive vouchers for fresh produce.
Join us to confirm your eligibility and submit your application on:
July 8th from 9:00 AM to 10:30 AM at the Hanover Township (Northampton County) Community Center
OR
July 21st from 9:00 AM to 10:30 AM at the Northampton Borough Recreation Center
July 21st from 2:00 PM to 3:00 PM at the Bath Borough Municipal Building
For more information, please contact my district office at 610-821-8468 or visit my website at
PASenatorMiller.com
.
I look forward to seeing you there!

ai_summary.summary: Senator Nick Miller's office is hosting three in-person events in July 2026, partnering with the Northampton County Area Agency on Aging, to help eligible seniors apply for the Senior Farmers Market Nutrition Program. The program provides vouchers that seniors can use to purchase fresh produce at farmers markets. Events are scheduled at community centers and municipal buildings in Hanover Township, Northampton Borough, and Bath Borough.

ai_summary.summary: This is the Pennsylvania Senate's legislative calendar for June 30, 2026, listing bills scheduled for floor votes. One bill (SB49) is up for final passage, roughly 25 bills are on third consideration (near final vote), about 12 bills are on second consideration, and several resolutions are scheduled, including two discharge resolutions to force committee-stalled bills to the full Senate floor and a State System of Higher Education property request requiring approval or disapproval.

About Senate video stream
All Senate floor action is broadcast live on this page. In addition, the signal is received by The Pennsylvania Cable Network (PCN) for rebroadcast to cable subscribers throughout the Commonwealth. PCN provides live broadcast of significant legislative events and provides a tape delay broadcast for other session activity during their evening public affairs program.

title: Senate Citations
raw_text:
Senate Citations
My office is happy to send Senate Citations to constituents who are interested in receiving acknowledgement for accomplishments, recent awards, and special occasions.
Senate Citations are requested for constituents or organizations who have reached a significant personal or professional milestone. Also, citations can be requested for Girl and Boy Scouts who will be awarded with the Gold Award or Eagle Scout designation.
If you would like to obtain a congratulatory, retirement, anniversary, condolence, or birthday citation from my office, please use the form below.
